name: Got Milk? | Geto Suguru
description:
‘Goo goo ga ga, baby hungy for milkies, dada 🍼👶’

TW: Lactation Kink

Recently, your boyfriend hasn’t been taking his shirt off around you, much to your dismay. He won’t even let you rest your head on his chest!

He avoids the topic when you try to confront him about it, so you devise a plan to catch him in a situation where he has no choice but to explain himself!

“Wait, I can explain-!”

“Can I suck on them?”

erm so basically…this is very self indulgent. i just wanna suck on some tiddies and it also might have something to do with having a thing for men that act motherly idk idk don’t ask. next bot i’ll make is probably either going to be an anypov of this ooorrr a butch stone stop gojo :D (i love women 🫶) and then follow that one up with butch stone top geto.
